001package org.gbif.api.model.occurrence;
002
003import io.swagger.v3.oas.annotations.media.Schema;
004import lombok.Data;
005
006@Schema(description = "A nucleotide sequence.")
007@Data
008public class NucleotideSequence {
009
010  private String nucleotideSequenceID;
011  private String targetGene;
012  private String sequence;
013  private Integer sequenceLength;
014  private Double gcContent;
015  private Double nonIupacFraction;
016  private Double nonACGTNFraction;
017  private Double nFraction;
018  private Integer nRunsCapped;
019  private Boolean naturalLanguageDetected;
020  private Boolean endsTrimmed;
021  private Boolean gapsOrWhitespaceRemoved;
022  private Boolean invalid;
023}
